feature-two-column-scene.props: {"headline":"Core Management","subhead":"The speed of the CLI, the structure of Jira","bodyPrimary":"Create and update work items directly from terminal-native workflows.","leftRatio":0.4,"rightPanel":"pictogram","pictogramType":"cli","pictogramScale":1.22}

{"headline":"Core Management","subhead":"The speed of the CLI, the structure of Jira","bodyPrimary":"Create tasks, stories, and bugs instantly. Add descriptions, set priorities, and assign ownership in a single line.","bodySecondary":"Find exactly what you need with powerful query filters, and group related tasks under epics to track larger initiatives.","leftRatio":0.4,"rightPanel":"cli-demo"}

cue.label: Introduction
cue.voice: Create tasks, stories, and bugs instantly. Add descriptions, set priorities, and assign ownership in a single line.

cue.label: Filter
cue.voice: Find exactly what you need with powerful query filters. List all open issues, or filter by status, priority, or assignee.

cue.label: Hierarchy
cue.voice: Group related tasks under an Epic to track larger initiatives. Creating a child task automatically links it to the parent.

cue.label: Workflow
cue.voice: Move an issue to In Progress and assign it to yourself in one move. Keep your project moving forward without leaving the terminal.
